secrets.name: INCODE_CLIENT_ID
secrets.label: Incode OIDC Client ID
secrets.description: Your Incode Workforce OIDC client ID. Found in the Incode Workforce Dashboard under your OIDC client settings.

secrets.name: INCODE_CLIENT_SECRET
secrets.label: Incode OIDC Client Secret
secrets.description: Your Incode Workforce OIDC client secret. Found in the Incode Workforce Dashboard under your OIDC client settings.

configuration.name: INCODE_AUTH_SERVER
configuration.label: Incode Auth Server URL
configuration.description: The base URL of the Incode Workforce OIDC authorization server.

configuration.name: AUTH0_DOMAIN
configuration.label: Auth0 Domain
configuration.description: Your Auth0 tenant domain, used to build the /continue redirect URI. Example: your-tenant.us.auth0.com (no https://).

configuration.name: SCOPES
configuration.label: OIDC Scopes
configuration.description: Space-separated OIDC scopes to request from Incode.
